authors: Sophie Morosoli Valeria Resendez Laurens Naudts Natali Helberger Claes de Vreese a Amsterdam School of Communication Research
The Netherlandsb Department of Information Law
raw_title: “I Resist”. A Study of Individual Attitudes Towards Generative AI in Journalism and Acts of Resistance, Risk Perceptions, Trust and Credibility
title_en: “I Resist”. A Study of Individual Attitudes Towards Generative AI in Journalism and Acts of Resistance, Risk Perceptions, Trust and Credibility
title_zh: “我抵制”。关于新闻业中个体对生成式人工智能的态度、抵制行为、风险感知、信任与可信度的研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻工作者对生成式人工智能的态度，包括他们如何抵制AI、如何看待相关风险，以及AI如何影响他们对新闻的信任和可信度。
plain_summary_en: This study explores journalists' attitudes towards generative AI, including how they resist it, perceive risks, and how AI affects trust and credibility in news.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻业中技术采纳与抵抗的个体心理因素，关注生成式AI对职业实践和新闻可信度的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating individual psychological factors in technology adoption and resistance in journalism, focusing on generative AI's impact on professional practices and news credibility.
